examples: He began to comfort me with such unaccustomed gentleness.
The old man's frenzy departed, and he became all gentleness.
There are some things that you can get with force, but there are other things that only come with the gentleness of a soft breath.
He teaches us that skill and force are not exclusive to gentleness or kindness.
The movie is so infantile that it achieves a special kind of purity and gentleness.
